flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Alaska Fairbanks rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Alaska Fairbanks fell 96% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.1%).
